strategy_snapshot.topology: AI Data Center Demand -> HBM4 Sold Out -> DRAM Pricing Power (Memflation)
strategy_snapshot.fragile_point: 1-gamma yield stability vs Samsung/SK Hynix HBM4 catch-up
strategy_snapshot.core_thesis: Structural memory undersupply driven by HBM wafer consumption decoupling MU from legacy cycles.

stop_loss_rules.fundamental_melt_down: 1-gamma node yields < 70% or HBM4 qualification failure
stop_loss_rules.macro_kill_switch: DRAM spot prices decline > 15% in a single month
